input.config:
job: extension
config:
  name: test_training
  process:
    - type: sd_trainer
      trigger_word: test_style
      model:
        name_or_path: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0
        is_flux: false
      datasets:
        - folder_path: /workspace/datasets/test
          caption_ext: txt
      train:
        batch_size: 1
        steps: 100
        lr: 0.0001

job: generate
config:
  name: test_generation
  process:
    - type: to_folder
      output_folder: /workspace/output/test
      generate:
        sampler: flowmatch
        width: 512
        height: 512
        guidance_scale: 2.0
        sample_steps: 20
        prompts:
          - "a test image for validation"
      model:
        name_or_path: /workspace/models/FLUX.1-dev
        is_flux: true
        quantize: false
        dtype: fp16
